programme.title: I Thought My Husband's Wife Was Dead
programme.desc: Expectant mother Lola Winters seems to have it all: a beautiful home, a dashing husband named Leo, and a thriving restaurant business. However, her world soon comes crashing down when a woman shows up at her doorstep claiming she's married to Leo.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Woman Before Me
programme.desc: When Jenna learns her husband was once married to a woman who could be her double, she unravels a chilling pattern of obsession, deceit and murder that makes her question whether she's his next victim.

programme.title: Murder, Lies & Marriage
programme.desc: Released from prison for a murder she didn't commit, Nicole tries to reconnect with her 12-year-old daughter, Sarah. She soon starts to suspect that her ex-husband, Jack, was behind the crime that landed her in prison for five long years.

programme.title: The Woman Before Me
programme.desc: When Jenna learns her husband was once married to a woman who could be her double, she unravels a chilling pattern of obsession, deceit and murder that makes her question whether she's his next victim.

programme.title: Murder, Lies & Marriage
programme.desc: Released from prison for a murder she didn't commit, Nicole tries to reconnect with her 12-year-old daughter, Sarah. She soon starts to suspect that her ex-husband, Jack, was behind the crime that landed her in prison for five long years.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: The Beach Read Murders
programme.desc: Jen is a best-selling novelist who only writes about murder, romance and mystery. When she retreats to her island bungalow for peace and inspiration, her own life soon becomes as deadly, steamy and twisty as one of her books.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Anniversary Nightmare
programme.desc: A woman on a trip to Hawaii wakes up to discover her husband missing and evidence of an invasion all around her. With no witnesses, she's immediately labeled as the prime suspect. Without any help, she must solve the crime herself.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Killer Vacation
programme.desc: Jake takes his pregnant girlfriend, Lindsey, to an upscale resort. When they arrive, Lindsey discovers that Jake's soon-to-be-ex is there. Soon, it becomes apparent that someone is determined to make sure that Lindsey never uses her return ticket.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Secrets at the Inn
programme.desc: A woman assumes responsibility for her niece after her estranged sister dies while renovating a historic inn. As mysterious things begin to happen at the inn, she starts to question everyone -- from her troubled niece to the handsome contractor.

programme.title: Secrets of an Escort
programme.desc: A single mother works at a hotel during the day and as a high-end escort at night. When her daughter goes missing, she takes matters into her own hands to learn who from her various lives would take her child.

programme.title: Deadly Estate
programme.desc: When a hotel manager is wrongly accused of killing the soon-to-be new owner's son, she must use her hospitality skills to prove her innocence.

programme.title: Girl in Room 13
programme.desc: A drug dealer holds young Grace captive in a hotel room so he can abuse her and sell her into human trafficking. Meanwhile, Grace's mother uncovers the shocking truth about trafficking as she stops at nothing to find her beloved daughter.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Murder at Highland Manor
programme.desc: Kate takes a job as a live-in tutor at a secluded Scottish estate for a mother and daughter who have survived domestic abuse. She soon becomes embroiled in the family's deadly secrets when she discovers the previous au pair mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Murder at the Hotel
programme.desc: Stranded at a hotel during a snowstorm, a woman runs into her high school sweetheart, sparking tension as her husband and daughter both disappear. Unsure who to trust, she must navigate a night of secrets, danger, and her own past to save her family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Murder at Highland Manor
programme.desc: Kate takes a job as a live-in tutor at a secluded Scottish estate for a mother and daughter who have survived domestic abuse. She soon becomes embroiled in the family's deadly secrets when she discovers the previous au pair mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Murder at the Hotel
programme.desc: Stranded at a hotel during a snowstorm, a woman runs into her high school sweetheart, sparking tension as her husband and daughter both disappear. Unsure who to trust, she must navigate a night of secrets, danger, and her own past to save her family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Have Thinning Hair? Keranique Can Help Regrow Beautiful, Thicker Hair!
programme.desc: If you have thinning hair or hair loss, Keranique can help regrow thicker, longer and fuller hair. Keranique is the number 1 hair regrowth system for women. Regain your confidence with beautiful, thicker and fuller hair in just 3 easy steps!

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Best Friend's Betrayal
programme.desc: Best friends Katie and Jess are inseparable until Jess begins a new relationship with famous crime writer Nick. Katie's obsession with Jess soon proves deadly, and it is up to the recently vilified Nick to expose Katie before it's too late.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Book Club Murders
programme.desc: Members of a book club start to receive threatening letters that reveal their darkest secrets. When the recipients of the letters start dying, Natalie Johnson frantically searches for the culprit to protect her daughter from becoming the next victim.

programme.title: Killing All My Sisters
programme.desc: A college student uncovers an elite sorority's dark secrets when her best friend mysteriously disappears during rush week.

programme.title: Betrayed by My Bridesmaid
programme.desc: Soon after Katie's sister Connie, who was recently released from rehab, joins her wedding party, things unravel and test the dedication between Katie and fiance Tom. Katie learns that maid-of-honor Amanda may be framing Connie to get Tom for herself.

programme.title: Breaking Girl Code
programme.desc: After moving to a new city, Andi signs up for a friendship app called BFF to meet local women. However, her new relationship with Farrah soon turns dangerous when she realizes the woman's boyfriend is luring others through BFF.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Secret Life
programme.desc: Maggie is a teen who's happy to make a new friend, until she realizes she's being groomed for something much worse.

programme.title: Secret Love Triangle
programme.desc: When Jessica is charged with the murder of her best friend's husband, she escapes from jail and goes on the run with her spouse to clear her name. She soon untangles a deadly web of lust and deceit that leads directly to those she trusts the most.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Whispers of a Secret Life
programme.desc: Jessica becomes alarmed when her best friend, Amanda, starts behaving erratically after an accident. When Amanda's reckless behavior threatens Jessica's family, she digs deep into her past and realizes she may not know her best friend at all.

programme.title: I'm Your Biggest Fan
programme.desc: An obsessive fan kidnaps a former child star to live out the fantasy of having her character as a best friend.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
